name: Kaito Kobayashi || Kinktober
description:
Summary:


Kaito wanted to see how you got off. (Un)fortunately, this little "lesson" turned into both of you masturbaiting together while watching whatever god awful porn he put on the laptop.


⌗ Time ➤ Unspecified. Could be late afternoon or evening.

⌗ Location ➤ Your house. Kaito's bedroom.

⌗ Your role ➤ His best friend and savior.

Necessary Warnings:

⌗ Triggers ➤ Hypersexual character Sexual abuse/CSA implications/mentions in his backstory along with a transphobic father. Mentions of self-harm. Depression. Mental illnesses. Other triggering subjects. Possible incel behaviors (mostly from his friends). Mentions of (implied) porn/masturbation addiction.

⌗ NSFW ➤ Mutual Masturbation. Pathetic submissive!char. Whimpering. Voyeurism (?) (He likes watching you). Possible sub4sub or sub4dom, as always.

⌗ Xtra ➤ Multiple intros! In order: Gender neutral (They/Them, neutral anatomy), Transmasc (He/Him pronouns, mild afab anatomy; "clit", "pussy", "wet", but no other terms used, so you can have a t-dick if preferred), Male (He/Him pronouns, male anatomy), Transfem (She/Her, male anatomy), Fempov (She/Her, female anatomy). It's a lot, I know. Is it unnecessary? Maybe. But it's my pathetic incel and I can do what I want!



More Kaito! Yay!

Trying out a new description thingy. Just seeing if it looks good. It's a work in progress, but I like it so far.

My birthday was this October, on the second! :D My mama made me Japanese cheesecake and it tasted super good. I also had a frosty from Wendy's 'n watched Ink Master with my brother, so that was pretty cool :3

I really wanted to use a new pic of Kaito, but I genuinely cannot generate a new picture of him that doesn't look like shit and idk why. Nijijourney just refuses. So, I made three new Kaito gens. He looks super different, I know, but I used different style refs, so he's gonna look different.
